appraisal_events.evidence: « Du reste… il ne faut jamais discuter le choix des amants. » — « Mais après avoir posé ce principe, elle y manqua immédiatement en critiquant le choix de Robert de Saint-Loup. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator highlights the duchess’s inconsistency: she lays down a principle against judging lovers’ choices, then immediately violates it by criticizing Robert de Saint-Loup’s choice, undercutting her authority and poise.

status_effects.explanation: Her self-contradiction makes her appear less reliable and undermines the weight of her fashionable, ‘philosophical’ pronouncements.
